race.description: Kooringal Stud Wagga Town Plate Prelude Hcp
race.comment: ONE HARD LADY (8) was well fancied when resuming but found one better at Albury over the 900m. Boasts a strong record early in the prep and is drawn well. Can go one better. TEYLU (7) is as consistent as they come for the Vella yard. Closed off strongly last start to just miss at Canberra when resuming. Winkers come off second up and blinkers go on first time. Fitter and looms a big threat. KEIKOKU (11) has turned into a perennial placegetter but still boasts peaks that can give this a big shake. Watch for him bursting through. LOVE SHUCK (6) has improved with each run in this campaign and should be hitting his straps now. Shoulders a strong record over this track and trip and has been freshened with 58 days. Overlook at your own peril.
